news.t: T. ROWE PRICE INTRODUCES NEW THEMATIC ACTIVE ETF FOCUSED ON COMPANIES LEADING INNOVATION

holdings.infoBox: TNXT is an equity ETF with a total of 272 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.67%, Apple at 4.89%, Amazon.com at 3.19%, Broadcom at 3.18%, and Microsoft at 2.81%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Innovation Leaders ETF (TNXT) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 17.33m in AUM and 265 holdings. TNXT is actively managed, targeting companies considered leaders of innovation primarily in developed markets, but may reach into emerging markets as well TNXT was launched on Jan 28, 2026 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: T. ROWE PRICE INTRODUCES NEW THEMATIC ACTIVE ETF FOCUSED ON COMPANIES LEADING INNOVATION
data.text: The Innovation Leaders ETF offers investors access to disruptive companies across sectors like technology, healthcare, and financials.
